text: I feel as if I am wandering through the quiet, liminal spaces of an institution dedicated to creation and discovery. The glow from the distant neon light evokes both curiosity and a faint sense of unease—an atmosphere reminiscent of late hours when the mind is free to question and contemplate without distraction. In the presence of "R+D," I am reminded of the ever-evolving journey of knowledge, the constant push to innovate, and an unspoken invitation to contribute to the ongoing dialogue between the known and the unknown. It is as though I am on the threshold of potential, poised between what has been realized and what is still possible.
